---
name: Feature request
about: A capability you want the harness to grow
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

A clear description of the capability. One paragraph.

## Why it would help

The actual problem this solves — what happens today without it, and
what would change if it shipped.

## Alternatives you considered

Briefly: other ways to solve this you thought about, and why this is
the right shape. Include "do nothing" if you weighed it.

## Anything else

Optional. Related grader types, prior art from other eval frameworks
(promptfoo, deepeval, ragas, the Anthropic internal evals doc).
